title: YM-Additions
description: Remote management & access to the AE network.
body:
This mod provides an ME Wireless Transceiver for remote management and connection to the ME network.  \
You no longer need to run around connecting different nodes, and it has been modified from one-to-one to one-to-many.   \
The GUI displays the remaining channels and also supports cross-dimensional functionality!  \
Unlike the Wireless Connector from AE2 Stuff, this mod can be operated through the GUI.  \
![gui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7cc99d97c24d2bd925b19aae39f7018013548565_0.webp)
